title: arenaria modesta subsp. modesta
intro: Arenaria modesta subsp. modesta, also known as the modest sandwort, is a plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, the modest sandwort has been used in herbal medicine, primarily due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of modest sandwort include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism, as well as its potential to act as a natural antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, modest sandwort is often used as a dried herb or infusion, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
